calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-30-2014 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE CYNTHIA M. LEE; Clerk KCox; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-17-2013 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-10-2012 Continued To Jun-10-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-20-2012 Continued To Jun-15-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion Andm Otion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Mar-19-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Richard Nelson, Esq., of Lerner Veit & Stanaland, LLP, Tel. 415.781.4000, appearing for Plaintiffs and moving party.

No other appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CARLOS CASTRO'S Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint is Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.
